name: Flow 0 - CSV Migration & Lead Scoring
description: Imports existing leads from CSV, enriches contact info, scores via Claude API, saves to Airtable with pending_review status

parameters.name: fields
parameters.value:
{
  "legal_name": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.legal_name }}",
  "business_email": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.business_email }}",
  "phone": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.phone }}",
  "website": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.website }}",
  "county": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.county }}",
  "employees_estimate": {{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.employees_estimate }},
  "score": {{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.score }},
  "service_fit": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.service_fit }}",
  "segment": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.segment }}",
  "priority": {{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.priority }},
  "intent_signal": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.intent_signal }}",
  "icebreaker": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.icebreaker }}",
  "pipeline_status": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.pipeline_status }}",
  "source": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.source }}",
  "created_at": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.created_at }}"
}

parameters.name: fields
parameters.value:
{
  "event_type": "created",
  "prospect_id": "{{ $node['Save to Airtable Prospects'].json.id }}",
  "email": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.business_email }}",
  "legal_name": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.legal_name }}",
  "segment": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.segment }}",
  "timestamp": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.created_at }}",
  "details": "Lead imported from CSV migration"
}

parameters.name: fields
parameters.value:
{
  "event_type": "scored",
  "prospect_id": "{{ $node['Save to Airtable Prospects'].json.id }}",
  "email": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.business_email }}",
  "legal_name": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.legal_name }}",
  "score": {{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.score }},
  "segment": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.segment }}",
  "priority": {{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.priority }},
  "timestamp": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.scored_at }}",
  "details": "Lead scored via Claude API (service_fit={{$node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.service_fit}}, intent={{$node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.intent_signal}}))"
}
